creator: stephon@gmail.com
text:
Hello All
Sorry for my fault, it's the mistake of diff file not fully patched.
But the functionality is not workable, shows that

[Dec 24 15:52:47.588] Server {0x10024041c0} WARNING: Access logging to
local log directory suspended - configured space allocation exhausted.
[Dec 24 15:52:47.602] Server {0x10024041c0} NOTE: traffic server running
[Dec 24 15:53:05.600] Manager {0x10022041c0} ERROR:
[LocalManager::pollMgmtProcessServer] Server Process terminated due to Sig
9: Killed: 9
[Dec 24 15:53:05.600] Manager {0x10022041c0} ERROR:  (last system error 0:
No error: 0)
[Dec 24 15:53:05.600] Manager {0x10022041c0} ERROR: [Alarms::signalAlarm]
Server Process was reset
[Dec 24 15:53:05.601] Manager {0x10022041c0} ERROR:  (last system error 0:
No error: 0)
[Dec 24 15:53:06.618] Manager {0x10022041c0} NOTE:
[LocalManager::startProxy] Launching ts process
[TrafficServer] using root directory '/usr/local'

Will lookup further to check out what the problem is.

--
Stephon, Bo-Chong Chen
System Engineer
PIXNET Digital Media Corp.
email: stephon@gmail.com


On Tue, Dec 18, 2012 at 12:07 PM, Stephon Chen <stephon@gmail.com> wrote:

> Hello All,
>
> I've tried using the latest diff.
> But while compiling, it shows error:

> ParseRules.cc:34:27: error: ParseRulesCType: No such file or directory

> directory
> ParseRules.cc:40:34: error: ParseRulesCTypeToLower: No such file or
> directory
> *** Error code 1
>
> Stop in /usr/ports/www/trafficserver/work/trafficserver-3.2.0/lib/ts.
> *** Error code 1
>
> Stop in /usr/ports/www/trafficserver/work/trafficserver-3.2.0/lib/ts.
> *** Error code 1
>
> Stop in /usr/ports/www/trafficserver/work/trafficserver-3.2.0/lib.
> *** Error code 1
>
> Stop in /usr/ports/www/trafficserver/work/trafficserver-3.2.0.

>
> Stop in /usr/ports/www/trafficserver.
>
